Container.Name: posterpilot
Container.Overview: PosterPilot is a self-hosted artwork manager for Plex, Jellyfin and Emby. Browse your library, find covers across MediUX, Fanart.tv, TMDB and ThePosterDB, and apply them directly to your media server and/or by exporting Kometa/PMM-compatible YAML. Credentials can be set here or in the in-app Settings page (including Plex login). Point the /kometa volume at your existing Kometa config to have exported YAML picked up on its next run.
Container.Description: Self-hosted artwork manager for Plex, Jellyfin and Emby — find covers across MediUX, Fanart.tv, TMDB and ThePosterDB and apply them to your server or via Kometa/PMM YAML. Multi-language UI; configure here or in the Settings page.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: HTTP port for the PosterPilot web UI.

Config.Name: App data (/data)
Config.Description: Persistent SQLite database, settings, history and the rotating log file (/data/logs). Keep this on a mounted volume so state survives updates; no extra log volume is needed.

Config.Name: Kometa assets (/kometa)
Config.Description: Optional. Mount your existing Kometa assets/config directory so exported YAML lands where Kometa reads it. Leave default if you do not use Kometa.

Config.Name: Server type
Config.Description: Which media server to manage: plex, jellyfin, or emby. Default plex.

Config.Name: TMDB key
Config.Description: TMDB v3 API key or v4 bearer/JWT (auto-detected). Required for metadata + TMDB artwork. Or set it in Settings.

Config.Name: Plex URL
Config.Description: e.g. http://192.168.1.10:32400 — or use the in-app Plex login / connection discovery.

Config.Name: Plex token
Config.Description: Your X-Plex-Token. Leave blank to acquire it via the in-app Plex login.

Config.Name: Jellyfin URL
Config.Description: Jellyfin base URL (when Server type = jellyfin).

Config.Name: Jellyfin API key
Config.Description: Jellyfin API key (when Server type = jellyfin).

Config.Name: Emby URL
Config.Description: Emby base URL (when Server type = emby).

Config.Name: Emby API key
Config.Description: Emby API key (when Server type = emby).

Config.Name: Fanart.tv key
Config.Description: Fanart.tv personal API key — enables the Fanart.tv artwork provider.

Config.Name: UI language
Config.Description: UI locale: en (default), es, zh, ja, or pt-BR.

Config.Name: Log directory
Config.Description: Folder for the rotating log file (posterpilot.log). Default /data/logs — already inside the /data volume, so no extra mount is needed.

Config.Name: Event retention
Config.Description: Max number of activity-log rows kept in the database; older rows are pruned. Default 2000.

Config.Name: Port (internal)
Config.Description: Internal listen port. Leave at 3000 unless you know what you are doing.
